about.title: The WG Almeida Group is an integrated ecosystem of solutions in high-end architecture, engineering, and bespoke joinery.
paragraphs: We integrate architecture, engineering, and bespoke joinery into a single workflow, connecting concept, planning, and execution with more coherence, clarity, and control at each stage.
More than just designing and building, we deliver control, predictability, and peace of mind for those who value excellence.

hero.title: The WG Almeida Brand
hero.subtitle: Our brand translates an integrated operation between architecture, engineering, and bespoke joinery, with more predictability, clarity, and excellence in delivery.

purpose.title: An identity built to integrate beauty, technique, and delivery.
paragraphs: The WG Almeida brand comes from the union of aesthetic sensitivity, technical rigor, and operational responsibility.
Every division communicates the same promise: turning complex decisions into a clearer, traceable, and coherent client journey.

mission.title: Mission
paragraphs: To design, plan, and execute high-end spaces with method, precision, and care at every stage.
To reduce friction between design, construction, and bespoke joinery through an integrated, data-oriented operation.
mission.quote: Excellence is not improvisation. It is process, criteria, and follow-up.

vision.title: Vision
paragraphs: To become a reference in integrating architecture, engineering, bespoke joinery, and technology applied to the construction journey.
To continuously evolve in order to deliver more clarity, control, and experience in residential and corporate projects.

values.title: Creativity

values.title: Excellence
values.description: Finishing, service, and delivery treated as part of the same standard.

architecturePage.servicesSubtitle: Architecture organizes aesthetic intent, briefing, ergonomics, technical coordination, and decisions that affect construction, joinery, and budget.

services.title: Architectural design
services.description: Layout study, volume, implantation, and spatial language with technical reading from the beginning.

services.title: Original interiors
services.description: Material, lighting, finish, and atmosphere curation for residential and corporate spaces.

services.title: Technical project
services.description: Detailed documentation to reduce site doubts, rework, wrong purchases, and incompatibilities.

services.title: Integrated coordination
services.description: Architecture connected to engineering, bespoke joinery, suppliers, and execution schedule.

commitment.imageAlt: Premium space with architecture integrated into execution
commitment.title: Beauty, method, and decision in one flow.
paragraphs: Architecture must translate desire into concrete decisions: measurements, materials, interfaces, priorities, and responsibilities.
When the project is born connected to construction, the client understands investment better and execution gains predictability.
Our work integrates aesthetics, technique, and management so every choice has clear intention and consequence.

hero.imageAlt: High-end construction site with integrated engineering management

services.title: Construction planning
services.description: Organization of stages, critical purchases, work fronts and approvals before execution begins.

services.title: Technical coordination
services.description: Integrated review across architecture, systems, woodworking, suppliers and real site constraints.

services.title: Execution management
services.description: Site monitoring with sequence control, front release and reduced rework.

services.title: Assisted handover
services.description: Final checks, finish adjustments and organized delivery with clear communication for the client.

commitment.imageAlt: Technical team monitoring a premium construction project
commitment.title: Control, predictability and delivery in one flow.
paragraphs: Engineering translates design into an execution sequence, with clear decisions before the site pressures schedule and budget.
Each work front needs release criteria, defined responsibility and visible financial impact.
Our monitoring connects schedule, suppliers, purchases and site work to reduce improvisation and protect final quality.

hero.title: Authorial woodworking integrated with design and construction.
hero.subtitle: Planned furniture, technical detailing and coordinated production for high-end residential and corporate spaces.
hero.badge: Custom production with the WG method.
hero.imageAlt: Custom woodworking in a premium interior

carpentryPage.servicesTitle: Woodworking that starts with the project.
carpentryPage.servicesSubtitle: Woodworking organizes measurements, use, finish and fabrication so aesthetics and execution arrive together.

services.title: Woodworking design
services.description: Furniture detailing, modulation, ergonomics, hardware and integration with the room layout.

services.title: Finish curation
services.description: Definition of veneers, patterns, colors, textures and combinations aligned with the project.

services.title: Coordinated production
services.description: Planning of measurement, approval, fabrication and installation aligned with the construction schedule.

services.title: Assembly and handover
services.description: Supervised installation, final adjustments and finish checks for a consistent delivery.

commitment.imageAlt: Premium woodworking detail with custom finish
commitment.badge: A well-resolved detail is a decision made at the right time.
commitment.title: Precision, materiality and installation under control.
paragraphs: Woodworking needs to be planned before walls, electrical points and final measurements are closed.
When design, measurement and fabrication communicate, the finish gains precision and the client gains predictability.
Our structure connects technical drawings, material choices and installation to reduce friction between expectation and delivery.

hero.title: Let's build your quote.
hero.subtitle: Answer 4 quick questions and our artificial intelligence will help our technical team prepare the best proposal for your profile.

contexts.moodboard: You arrived through the moodboard journey. Let's translate this aesthetic direction into a briefing, proposal, and real next step.
contexts.room: You arrived through the room visualizer. Now we can transform the visual reading into scope, proposal, or assisted service.
contexts.buildtech: You arrived through the WG_Build.tech front. Let's frame this experience as a solution applied to your commercial or operational context.
contexts.process: You arrived through the process methodology. Now let's connect this reading to an assisted service and the most coherent proposal.
contexts.architecture: You arrived through the architecture front. We can use the visual experience layer to accelerate aesthetic alignment, briefing, and approval.
contexts.engineering: You arrived through the engineering front. Let's connect the visual decision to execution logic, critical purchases, and front releases.
contexts.carpentry: You arrived through the Bespoke Joinery front. We can structure the visual experience to reduce rework in measurement, approval, and production.
contexts.turnkey: You arrived through the turn key journey. Now let's add the visual experience layer to the integrated design, construction, and delivery flow.
contexts.vila-nova: You arrived through a premium interiors page. We can transform this aesthetic reading into a briefing, curation, and assisted proposal.

intents.obra: You showed interest in construction and renovation. Let's size your project with cost, deadline, and a detailed technical proposal.
intents.marcenaria: You showed interest in Bespoke Joinery. We can start with a visual briefing and move to measurement and proposal.
intents.design: You showed interest in visual experience and design. Let's use your style guide as a starting point for the project.
intents.investimento: You showed interest in investment analysis. We can structure the EVF, AVM, and construction cost into a single proposal.

messages.wgExperienceCore: Complexity, logic, rules, and automation work behind the scenes. In front, the experience needs to be objective, intuitive, and useful for deciding and executing.
messages.wgAutomationPromise: WG technology exists to reduce friction, automate routines, organize information, and facilitate the daily life of those who sell, approve, specify, execute, or invest.
messages.obraeasyPromise: ObraEasy organizes the work by real operational stages: what starts first, what depends on measurement, what needs approval, and what can be produced in parallel.
messages.obraeasyB2B: ObraEasy connects feasibility, operational stages, execution, and real financials to reduce guesswork in retrofit, renovation, and higher ticket deployment.
messages.obraeasyBenchmarks: SINAPI, CUB/SINDUSCON, and FipeZap enter as references. The WG differential lies in transforming the market, budget, and real construction into actionable insight for decision-making.
messages.iccriPositioning: ICCRI is WG Almeida's proprietary engine to connect categories, services, compositions, and operational reading of the work.
messages.marketReferences: SINAPI, CUB/SINDUSCON, FipeZAP, and other bases enter as references. The experience organization follows the WG Almeida operational methodology.
messages.easyRealStateB2B: Easy Real State connects current value, real closing, and post-construction potential in the same flow to support higher-ticket real estate decisions.
messages.easyRealStateConfidence: The asset reading doesn't need to seem absolute to generate value. It can be in an experimental, assisted, or already defensible phase, according to the strength of the real base for that objective.
messages.easyRealStateBenchmarks: The engine refinement considers national and international AVM, real closing, and valuation references, but the WG advantage lies in the connection between market, construction, and value capture.
messages.obraeasyCapture: In the WG ecosystem, construction stops being just a cost. It starts to show how much of the asset thesis is already being protected, validated, or unlocked by real execution.
messages.wgExperienceSystem: The WG experience system transforms references, style, briefing, and context into a clearer journey of visual decision, alignment, and execution.
messages.wgExperienceAddon: As an add-on, this front can enter before the project, during pre-sales, or as an alignment layer between client, broker, architect, and team.
messages.wgExperienceConversion: The function of this layer is not to generate another tool. It is to reduce indecision, organize preferences, and bring inspiration closer to proposal, project, and real construction.

architecture.methodTitle: Premium architecture needs to organize decision before organizing finish
architecture.methodDesc: In architecture, this means defining layout, materials, technical interfaces, and fronts that depend on approval or measurement before construction pressures deadline and cost.
architecture.addonTitle: Before detailing everything, architecture can enter with guided aesthetic reading
architecture.addonDesc: This layer works well as project onboarding, consultative pre-sales, or alignment between client, architect, and family before closing materials and high-impact decisions.
addonPoints: Defines dominant style, palette, and expected feeling with less indecision.
Reduces rework in briefing, disconnected references, and subjective approvals.
Creates a direct bridge between moodboard, visualization, and assisted proposal.

engineering.title: Global Contract (Engineering)
engineering.subtitle: Stages organized in logical order. Each step needs approval before releasing the next.
engineering.methodTitle: Strong engineering is not just execution. It is sequence, release, and front control
engineering.methodDesc: In the field, this means releasing the work at the right time, testing before closing, triggering critical purchases in advance, and coordinating fronts that go into parallel production.
engineering.addonTitle: Engineering gains speed when the visual decision arrives more organized
engineering.addonDesc: In engineering, this layer helps consolidate references, reduce late revisions, and connect visual expectation with purchases, measurement, and front release.
addonPoints: Anticipation of choices that usually stall work or generate rework.
Clearer briefing for coordination, approvals, and executive sequence.
Assisted entry for pre-sales, retrofit, or higher-ticket renovation.

carpentry.methodTitle: Bespoke Joinery doesn't just enter at the end. It needs to be measured, approved, and produced at the right time
carpentry.methodDesc: In well-coordinated works, Bespoke Joinery functions as a production front, with its own window for measurement, approval, fabrication, and assembly.
carpentry.addonTitle: Bespoke Joinery performs better when visual approval happens before production
carpentry.addonDesc: The visual experience layer helps organize language, atmosphere, and use before final measurement, executive drawing, and custom manufacturing.
addonPoints: Approves materials, finishes, and the feeling of the set with less noise.
Improves alignment between client, architect, and production team.
Creates a clearer base for detailing, assembly, and final delivery.

story.title: From concept to delivery, with one logic.
paragraphs: Grupo WG Almeida was created to reduce the distance between design, construction and final delivery.
Each project is guided by context, coordination, planning and real follow-up.
The result is a more predictable, organized and coherent experience from briefing to the last detail.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Transform ideas into high-end spaces with method, beauty, control and responsibility.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Be a reference in integrating architecture, engineering, millwork and technology for construction journeys.

values.title: Values
values.description: Clarity, technical precision, respect for the client, finish quality and commitment to delivery.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: Create environments that organize life, express identity and connect desire, design and reality.

ceo.name: William Almeida
ceo.imageAlt: William Almeida, founder and director of Grupo WG Almeida
paragraphs: Before becoming a group or a structure, there was a shared challenge: important decisions without clear data.
The answer was not improvisation. It was structure.
The operation evolved to connect briefing, design, budget, execution and delivery.
WG Easy emerged as an operational intelligence layer for traceable information.
Grupo WG Almeida brings executive vision, design sensitivity and technical control together.

differential.title: Real integration between design, construction and delivery.
differential.paragraph: The client does not need to manage conflicts between suppliers, disciplines and technical decisions.
differential.quote: Excellence is process, method and follow-up.
